suggestions.title: Centralize circuit breaker checks
suggestions.rationale: A single function reduces bugs and ensures consistent enforcement across phases.
suggestions.metric_or_proof: Fewer duplicated checks across phase handlers.
suggestions.patch_unified_diff:
diff --git a/conductor.py b/conductor.py
index 000..111 100644
--- a/conductor.py
+++ b/conductor.py
@@
+def check_breakers(state, limits):
+    ...
